PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Scherer for and with (petitioner) Dr. Bruce Cree.

The Court stated that it has read the briefing and asked if there was any other evidence available. Mr. Scherer stated that the entire purpose was to acknowledge community property, that petitioner and his wife were 30 years old when this happened, that it was a tragic death, that the parents have independent counsel, that they have had the proposals and have had ample time to object and that there had been a flurry of activity of buying and selling property. The petition for spousal property was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
